prestazioni: Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (60-trim compressor, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL 44mm external wastegate for VG20DET’s 2.0L inline-6, targeting 350-400whp on E85 with supporting mods

HKS 264°/264° camshafts (P/N 22003-AK003) paired with Tomei adjustable cam gears (P/N 143015) and Ferrea 1mm oversized intake/exhaust valves (P/N F6001/F6002) for optimized VG20DET airflow at 8,500 RPM redline

Nismo 740cc/min top-feed fuel injectors (P/N 16600-40U00) with Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump (P/N F90000267) and Sard 1,000cc/min fuel pressure regulator (P/N SR-FPR1) to support E85 fueling on the VG20DET’s stock fuel rail
estetica: Vertex Lang II JDM-spec front bumper (P/N KN-010) with custom carbon fiber splitter and 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in Nissan ‘Midnight Purple III’ (KH3) for A31 chassis clearance
Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +35 wheels (P/N 1793509) with 225/45/17 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires, paired with Nismo 5/16" extended wheel studs (P/N 40200-31U00) for A31 hub conversion
C-West JDM-spec rear wing (P/N CW-001) with custom aluminum uprights and Gurney flap, finished in Nissan ‘Gun Grey’ (KY0) to match A31’s OEM color code
